channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Iran war wipes $120bn off Dubai, Abu Dhabi stock markets
item.description: The UAE's financial markets have been some of the hardest hit by the fallout of the US-Israel war on Iran.

item.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 32 of US-Israel attacks?
item.description: In an exclusive interview with Al Jazeera, Secretary of State Rubio said US war objectives would be achieved in 'weeks'.

item.title: Israel says four soldiers killed as army pushes deeper into south Lebanon
item.description: Hezbollah attempts to make Lebanon ground invasion 'costly' for Israeli army as it continues its advance.

item.title: Three scenarios for the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Two military scenarios and one diplomatic one emerge, with Pakistan playing a crucial mediatory role.

item.title: South Korean president promises maximum response to energy crisis
item.description: South Korean president Myung vowed to respond to the energy crisis caused by Iran war to the fullest extent possible.

item.title: Drone attack sparks fire on Kuwaiti tanker in UAE amid Iran’s Gulf attacks
item.description: Dubai authorities say blaze contained with no oil leakage or injuries reported, as attacks are reported across the Gulf.

item.title: Spain closes airspace to US warplanes involved in war on Iran
item.description: Spain has taken another step in rejecting the US-Israeli war on Iran, denying US warplanes the use of its airspace.

item.title: Pentagon denies that Hegseth’s broker sought investment before Iran war
item.description: US Department of Defense demands retraction of report alleging broker sought multimillion-dollar investment for Hegseth.

item.title: Intense US-Israeli attacks on Iranian city of Isfahan cause column of fire
item.description: Witnesses have captured intense US-Israeli attacks on Isfahan, a city in Iran with a population of 2.3M.

item.title: At least 70 killed, 30 wounded in Haiti gang attack, rights group says
item.description: Death toll by the Defenseurs Plus rights group significantly exceeds ⁠official estimates of 16.
